---
title: 'FastPoints: A State-of-the-Art Point Cloud Renderer for Unity'
author:
- Elias Neuman-Donihue
- Michael Jarvis
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- comp_human
url_source: https://library.imaging.org/ei/articles/35/1/VDA-394
talk_source: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1uGBpXc0XrPnwUAHTadLj1CsvmZMXyr4B7G8UAF9Fn2E/edit?usp=sharing
code_source: https://github.com/eliasnd/FastPoints
journ: IS&T EI (VDA)
year: 2023
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 67
---
